chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
text:
(a) Notice of the election must be published in a daily newspaper in the municipality for at least 20 successive days before the date of the election.

(b) This notice requirement supersedes the notice requirements prescribed by Section 4.003 (Method of Giving Notice) , Election Code, except as provided by that section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.075 — Election Notice

(a) Notice of the election must be published in a daily newspaper in the municipality for at least 20 successive days before the date of the election.

(b) This notice requirement supersedes the notice requirements prescribed by Section 4.003 (Method of Giving Notice) , Election Code, except as provided by that section.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Notice of the election must be published in a daily newspaper in the municipality for at least 20 successive days before the date of the election.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This notice requirement supersedes the notice requirements prescribed by Section 4.003 (Method of Giving Notice) , Election Code, except as provided by that section.
